name: dump_replay_syscollector_full
description: Replay a recorded syscollector_vd VDFirst session (598 packages + system) from a real agent. 4 simulated agents loop the dump for 60s — modest stress on the multi-index, VD-module path of the manager. Tests both the VD bypass of the global all-agents lock (manager-side) and the dump replay correctness at small concurrency.
